description: Quicksold.co.uk appears to provide a location-related web service, including a coordinate conversion endpoint from WGS84 to OSGB36. Publicly available machine-readable documentation points to a small REST API hosted on quicksold.co.uk.
summary: Quicksold exposes one documented HTTP REST API surface with an OpenAPI spec; no public evidence of GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surfaces was found, and authentication could not be confirmed from the available docs/spec.
